content.en:
Sunrise Mountain.

The white-bearded old man was a little surprised when he received the summons from the Temple of Eternity.

"Endless Lord Ye Tian passed the requirements of the Eternal Hall and successfully obtained the invitation of the Eternal Palace?"

The white-bearded old man knew that Ye Tian was very demonic, and his achievements in the future would definitely be very high, and he even had the hope of becoming an eternal master, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to successfully join the Eternal Hall in such a short time.

Wow!

A clone of the white-bearded old man tore through time and space and descended on the Infinite Mountain.

When the white-bearded old man arrived, Ye Tian sensed it, and even guessed the white-bearded old man's intention, so he immediately came out to greet the white-bearded old man.

"Old man with white beard, please!"

Ye Tian said very politely.

"Good!"

The white-bearded old man walked into Wuliang Mountain, sat at a quaint stone table with Ye Tian, and the two drank tea and chatted.

"Endless Lord, I am here on behalf of the Temple of Eternity. The white-bearded old man said after taking a sip of tea.

Ye Tian smiled slightly, "Old man with white beard, when you came, I roughly guessed it." "

"Wait a minute, I'll take you to the Temple of Eternity, and I can tell you some things. The white-bearded old man said.

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

After the two finished drinking tea, they left Wuliang Mountain.

......

The white-bearded old man took out a small door, which instantly turned into a giant gate in the void area, and the appearance of the door caused a change in time and space, as if it could connect unknown space-time regions.

"This is the Eternal Time and Space Gate, every member of the Eternal Hall has one, except for the Eternal Master, we, the peak Legendary Realm Lords, must pass through the Eternal Time and Space Gate to reach the Eternal Hall. The white-bearded old man introduced.

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded, indicating that he understood.

Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man stepped into the Eternal Time and Space Gate, and after stepping in, the Eternal Time and Space Gate disappeared in an instant.

The two of them followed a space-time passage and soon arrived at a magnificent temple.

This is the Temple of Eternity.

Coming to the Hall of Eternity, the white-bearded old man introduced: "In addition to one instrument spirit in the Hall of Eternity, there are also some peak Legendary Realm lords staying here, and the Eternal Masters are usually not there, and occasionally incarnate and descend. Now that you have come to the Hall of Eternity, I will take you to the machine spirit first, go through the procedures for joining the Hall of Eternity, and introduce the situation of the Hall of Eternity a little. "

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and followed the white-bearded old man to a hall.

Soon, the spirit of the Temple of Eternity emerged.

"Lord Ruin, this is the new member, Endless Lord Ye Tian. "

The white-bearded old man said respectfully.

"Let's follow the formalities, register the identity information and basic information first, and then apply for an identity token for you. "

Said the Artifact Ruins.

Soon, the formalities were completed, and Ye Tian also obtained an identity token, representing his identity.

Then, a small door fell on Ye Tian's hand.

"This is the Eternal Time and Space Gate, after refining it, you can come to the Eternal Hall at any time in the future. Ruin Scar introduced.

"I'll let the White Beard guide introduce you to the rest. "

With that, the ruins disappeared.

And the white-bearded old man took Ye Tian to an independent void world, and here, there is a quaint courtyard, and this small courtyard is the residence of the white-bearded old man in the Eternal Palace.

At this time, Ye Tian had a lot of doubts waiting for the white-bearded old man to answer.

As soon as he sat down, Ye Tian asked curiously, "Old man with white beard, can you tell me about the situation in the Eternal Hall now?"

"Hahaha, naturally. The white-bearded old man stroked his beard and spoke, "The Eternal Hall was created by the first Eternal Master, but that one has already fallen, and he is the Master of the Shuhe River. Currently, the Eternal Hall has a total of seventy-three Eternal Masters, and twenty-three Peak Legendary Realm Lords!"

"So many pinnacle Legendary Realm lords!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, the conditions for joining the Eternal Hall were so harsh, and there were so many.

The white-bearded old man said with a smile: "Actually, most of them are the heirs or disciples of the Eternal Master, with the help of the Eternal Master, it is naturally normal to have the strength to join the Eternal Palace, plus some of them are incomparably ancient peak Legendary Realm Lords, after joining the Eternal Palace, they don't move much in the Void Area, so you don't know it." "

Ye Tian nodded silently and continued to listen.

The white-bearded old man said again: "In the Void Region, many Peak Legendary Realm Lords have misunderstood that the Eternal Masters are in the future era, in fact, the Eternal Masters will not casually cross the timeline, even if a certain treasure is born in the future, they can wait slowly, there is no need to cross to the future in an instant, it would be a waste of time, other Eternal Masters are cultivating, if they cross the timeline and go to the distant future, maybe the strength of other Eternal Masters will surpass their own." "

"Basically, the Eternal Masters are all in the current timeline, but the Eternal Masters don't usually stay in the Void Zone, so the Peak Legends Realm Lord can't find the Eternal Masters. "

"Next, I will reveal to you a huge secret that only the members of the Eternal Hall know. That is, beyond the Void Zone, there are other worlds. Places such as the Void Realm, known to the Eternal Masters as the Eternal Realm, have separate areas between each Eternal Realm. The partition area is divided into two parts, one is the Misty Corridor and the other is the Boundary River. The Mist Corridor is a mysterious area created by the influence between the Eternal Realm and the Boundary River, and it is difficult for the Peak Legendary Realm Lord to cross, and only the fifth-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord or the Eternal Master can ignore the influence of the Misty Corridor. "

"And many peak legendary realms in the void area, such as the peak legendary realm lords of the fourth level, have all gone to the boundary river, and the boundary river has many opportunities, if you are lucky, you may even hope to become an eternal master, but if you are there, it is easy to fall. "

When the white-bearded old man mentioned this secret, although Ye Tian was shocked, he was not surprised.

Earlier, when he talked to the Frontier Lord, he talked about this speculation, and the guess at that time was roughly correct, but it was not so specific.

"Could it be that Lord Yunsen just fell in the Boundary River?"

Ye Tian asked.

The white-bearded old man nodded slightly: "Yes, he fell in the realm, and he was very unlucky, he offended an eternal master, the other party directly killed the body of the Yunsen Lord across the boundary river and the misty corridor, because he is not a member of the Eternal Palace, so no eternal master protects him." "

"Lord Yunsen is not a member of the Eternal Temple, how did he get to the Boundary River?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The white-bearded old man explained: "Although Lord Yunsen is not a member of the Eternal Palace, he knows the Eternal Palace, and has passed the third level of the Dao Domain Tower, for the peak Legendary Realm Lord who has passed the third level, when the Dao Domain City is opened, he can go to the end, and there is a time and space gate there, which can connect the Boundary River. As a result, the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm lords could enter the Boundary River. However, although they can go to the Boundary River, their clones cannot return, and once they fall, they can only wait for the next Dao Domain City to open before they can leave the Void Zone again. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

When Dao Domain City was opened before, he was not qualified to pass the third level, so he naturally didn't know about it.

"These are the lists of the members of the Temple of Eternity, give it to you. "

The white-bearded old man gave Ye Tian a list.

Ye Tian took a look, and almost all of them were peak legendary realm lords he didn't know.

However, it is also normal, there are almost no opportunities in the Void Region that are useful to them, only the Boundary River has a great opportunity, they naturally will not haunt the Void Region, and no one will know about it after a long time.

Although the white-bearded old man is low-key, he likes to make friends, so he is known by many peak Legendary Realm lords in the Void Region.

"Endless Lord, the Temple of Eternity also has a free secret art library, you can go and check it out, it will only be good for you to create eternal mastery skills in the future. "

"By the way, the Temple of Eternity will not provide any resources, and the members of the Temple of Eternity must rely on themselves if they want resources. But as a member of the Eternal Temple, you don't have to worry about your own body being wiped out by the eternal masters of other Eternal Realms. This alone is worthy of a large number of peak Legendary Realm Lords to join the Hall of Eternity. "

"I'll give you another copy of the Boundary River information privately, so that you don't have to take many detours after entering the Boundary River in the future. "

As he spoke, the white-bearded old man handed Ye Tian a scroll that recorded the information of the boundary river.

"Thank you, Old Man Whitebeard!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Subsequently, Ye Tian learned many secrets from the mouth of the white-bearded old man.

After a while, the white-bearded old man left, and Ye Tian went to the secret art library of the Eternal Palace, which not only recorded a lot of secret techniques, but also recorded some secret techniques, which could allow him to understand the world beyond the void area more quickly.
